data.name: tlpEQ4.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="lblEQ4Name" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnEQ4Recipe" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="lblEQ4Recipe" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="cbxEQ4Recipe" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="3" ColumnSpan="2" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,20,Percent,20,Percent,20,Percent,20,Percent,20" /><Rows Styles="Percent,100" /></TableLayoutSettings>
